empty.title: No activity yet
empty.description: Comments and the ticket history show up here.

aiFill.tooltip: Regenerates this stage's fields with AI, based on everything done in the previous stages.
aiFill.title: Update fields with AI
aiFill.description: AI regenerates this stage's fields based on everything done in the previous stages. Say what should change — or leave blank for a straight refresh.
aiFill.placeholder: E.g.: make the caption shorter with a stronger CTA…

approval.resendConfirmDescription: The client will receive the link by email again.
approval.changesHelp: Make the requested adjustments and resend the link for the client to approve.
approval.noDetails: No details — the client just asked for adjustments.
approval.readyHelp: Send the pieces for the client to approve. The ticket moves to the Approval column.
approval.needsCreative: Add at least one ready creative before sending it for approval.
approval.sendConfirmDescription: The ticket moves to the Approval column and the client gets the link by email.
approval.sendError: Could not send it for approval.
approval.rejectConfirmDescription: The ticket leaves approval and returns to the team to rework the pieces.
approval.rejectError: Could not send it back to production.

attachments.title: Files
attachments.hint: Attach videos, images, PDFs and documents.

empty.title: No files yet
empty.description: Drag files here or click to upload — videos, images, PDFs, spreadsheets and documents.

attachments.renameDescription: Set a display name and an optional description.
attachments.deleteDescription: Remove {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

autopilot.title: Start on autopilot?
autopilot.description: The agent will fill in the brief, generate every creative and schedule the posts on every network. Once started, credits are consumed even if you adjust the schedule later.
autopilot.blocked: Some tickets require manual creatives and can't run in GO mode: {{titles}}.
autopilot.shortfall: You're {{count}} credits short for this plan. Buy more to continue.
autopilot.pendingVideo: Videos are not generated automatically in GO mode — they wait in the Production stage for you to generate manually.

comment.placeholder: Write a comment… use @ to mention (⌘+Enter to send)

creatives.title: Creatives
creatives.hint: Generate, upload or use a piece from the studio.

empty.title: No creatives yet
empty.description: Generate with AI, upload a file or use a piece already generated in the studio.

video.label: Video
video.desc: Talking avatar or product from photos

creatives.generateDescription: Pick the piece type and confirm — generation consumes credits.
creatives.nothingGeneratable: No generatable piece type for this ticket's channels and types. Upload a file or adjust the scope.

upload.title: Upload file
upload.description: Upload a finished piece — image or video.
upload.incompatible: Incompatible file: {{label}} doesn't accept this format.

picker.title: Use a studio creative
picker.description: Attach a piece already generated in the studio to this ticket (only the types this ticket accepts).
picker.emptySearchDescription: No studio piece (of the accepted types) matches the search.
picker.emptyDescription: No unattached creatives of the types this ticket accepts — generate one in the studio or adjust the scope.

creatives.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. The creative “{{name}}” will be permanently removed.

done.headline: Done
done.subtitle: Full retrospective of this ticket
done.noPosts: No posts recorded for this ticket.

ideation.title: Brief & Ideation
ideation.helper: The heart of the idea: for whom, why, and in what format.

brief.label: Brief
brief.placeholder: Describe the context, the message and the desired tone…

objective.label: Objective
objective.placeholder: E.g.: build awareness for the launch

target_persona.label: Target persona
target_persona.placeholder: Who do we want to reach?

scoping.title: Scope & Deliverables
scoping.helper: Define the creative type, the channels and what will be delivered.

creative_types.label: Creative types
creative_types.hint: Enabled by the chosen channels — the rest stay disabled

deliverables.label: Deliverables
deliverables.hint: At least one deliverable (one per line). At posting you pick which one goes live.

production.title: Production & Caption
production.helper: The final copy and hashtags. Client approval becomes actions below.

caption.label: Caption
caption.placeholder: Write or generate the final caption…

hashtags.label: Hashtags
hashtags.hint: Enter or comma adds; click the × to remove

production_scope.label: Production scope
production_scope.placeholder: Production directions — they guide creative generation (references, what to show/avoid, must-have elements)…

scheduled.title: Posting
scheduled.helper: Pick the creative and publish — immediately or scheduled.

retrospective.title: Retrospective
retrospective.helper: What worked, what to improve and the recommendation going forward.

wins.label: Wins
wins.placeholder: What went well? One per line…

improvements.label: Improvements
improvements.placeholder: What could be better? One per line…

fieldGroup.notConnectedClick: {{label}} isn't connected on this client — click to connect

posting.title: Posting
posting.hint: Pick one creative per type and publish — now or scheduled.

noTypes.title: No types defined
noTypes.description: Go back to Scoping and pick this ticket's creative types.

posting.coverHint: — becomes the video cover, or a post if there's no video
posting.noneReady: No {{type}} ready — generate or attach one in Production.
posting.goesLiveNote: The ticket moves to “Live” once publishing completes.

subtasksPanel.title: Subtasks
subtasksPanel.generateTooltip: Generate the production checklist with AI from the brief and the scope

actionsMenu.deleteWithLive: This ticket has posts LIVE — deleting erases the history and metrics of those posts (the content stays on the network; to take it down, unpublish first). It also removes tasks, creatives and schedules. This action cannot be undone.
actionsMenu.deleteDefault: This removes the ticket along with its tasks, creatives and scheduled posts. This action cannot be undone.
actionsMenu.archiveDescription: This ticket has scheduled posts — archiving cancels those schedules. You can restore and reschedule later.

body.cancelScheduleDescription: The post won't be published on this network. You can schedule it again anytime.

drawer.notFoundDescription: This ticket may have been removed, or you don't have access to it.

video.generationFailedHint: Ask in the chat to redo it, or generate the video again.
video.attachError: Couldn't attach. Use JPG, PNG, WEBP or MP4/MOV/WEBM video (max 50 MB).
video.annotatePlaceholder: What should change in this scene? (e.g.: closer shot, swap the text…)
video.attachReferenceScene: Attach a reference to this scene
video.uploadError: Couldn't upload. Use JPG, PNG, WEBP or MP4/MOV/WEBM video (max 50 MB).
video.chatHint: Say what you want to change — in the whole video or in one scene. Click a scene to annotate something specific; the notes go along with the message.
video.whatIsFileExample: What is this file? (e.g.: logo, character…)
video.composerRef: Say how to use the reference…
video.composerNotes: Write or send just the notes…
video.composerDefault: What do you want to change in the video?
video.finalizing: Rendering in high quality ({{scenes}}) — the preview keeps playing below.
video.workingBanner_one: Working on {{scenes}}… takes 1–2 min per scene.
video.interviewHint: Answer the questions in the chat. Once I have enough, I'll generate the draft here — or just say “go ahead”.
video.noDescription: No description — describe it when regenerating.
video.regenCost: −1 credit · doesn't redo the current scenes
video.musicPlaceholder: What track do you want? (e.g.: something upbeat, calm lo-fi, epic…)
video.uploadHint: Image or short reference video. Doesn't redo the scenes.
video.libraryEmpty: Nothing in the library yet. Upload or generate elements.
video.removeElementDescription: It stops being used in the next scene generations.
video.noElementsDescription: Add a character, setting or reference above.
video.interviewDescription: Tell me about the video in the chat. Once I have enough context I'll generate it — or ask me to generate whenever you want.
video.editDescription: Chat to edit. Click a scene to annotate; the notes go along with your next message.
video.noScenesDescription: This video has no editable scenes.
video.quickPreviewHint: Like it? Generate the final version — here or by asking in the chat.
